_publications._publicationTitle: Single-cell RNA sequencing of neurofibromas reveals a tumor microenvironment favorable for neural regeneration and immune suppression in a neurofibromatosis type 1 porcine model.

_contextSnippet: Immunohistochemistry revealed that both tumors displayed strong cytoplasmic and nuclear positivity for two proteins used in neurofibroma diagnosis, S100 positivity in Schwann cells
details: Demonstrated strong cytoplasmic and nuclear positivity in Schwann cells within neurofibromas, with little to no positivity in adjacent normal tissue
